title: Verify 'Remind Me' WhatsApp Notification
description: Tests that enabling the 'Remind Me' toggle triggers the correct backend process to send a notification 24 hours before trial expiry.
preconditions: User has an active trial with more than 24 hours remaining.
User has provided a valid WhatsApp number.
QA has access to backend logs or a test notification service.

steps.description: 2. Click the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle to enable it.
3. Verify the 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with page source 'trial corner'.
4. Check backend logs or a test message queue to confirm a notification has been scheduled for this user, timed for 24 hours before their trial end date.

expected_result: A notification is successfully scheduled in the backend system. A direct test of receiving the message may require time manipulation or a separate test environment.
